title: nyssanthes longistyla
intro: Nyssanthes longistyla, also known as the hairy fringed yellow flower or fringed yellow bellflower, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. The medicinal properties of Nyssanthes longistyla lie in its leaves and flowers, which are used to treat various health issues due to their anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory problems, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Nyssanthes longistyla can be made by infusing its leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, which is then consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
